name: Obsidian AI Bridge
notes: Obsidian plugin 0.1.2 adds Upload MD + Send and command Upload current Markdown as .md file to Web AI.

Web connector 0.1.5 supports receiving Markdown file tasks and assigning them to an existing file input. If the AI page has not exposed a file input, it returns a clear instruction to open the upload/attachment entry first.
Tampermonkey/ScriptCat menu keeps one toggle command: 🔗 连接 or 🔌 断开, plus ✨ 更新. Connecting another AI tab disconnects the previous one.
